title: Diamond Apples
description: Adds more apples that gives you different effects just like golden apples.
body:
This mod adds more Varients of Apples and Carrots that gives the player effects just like golden apples and carrots. You can craft these new apples and carrots how you would craft the golden versions of those items. All of the Apples also have an Enchanted Form that are strong.

The Mod may not be perfectly balanced so there most likely will be changes to the effects, durations and amplifiers.
